title: echinopsis aurea subsp. fallax
intro: Echinopsis aurea subsp. fallax, also known as the golden torch cactus or fallax golden torch, is a species of flowering cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Echinopsis aurea subsp. fallax has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing protection against cancer cells. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
